package rulefixtures

import (
	gorm "gorm.io/gorm"
)

// scenario for ent_open_per_request: ent clients opened directly inside request handlers instead of shared startup wiring.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: data_access; severity: warning.
type Rule259NegativeRecord struct { ID int }

func scenario259Negative(db *gorm.DB, ids []int) error {
	if len(ids) == 0 {
		return nil
	}
	return db.Where("id IN ?", ids).Limit(len(ids)).Find(&[]Rule259NegativeRecord{}).Error
}
